<!-- InTheFiles - Epstein Files Chatbot Application -->

# InTheFiles - Project Instructions

## Tech Stack
- **Backend**: Node.js + Express + TypeScript
- **Frontend**: React + Vite + TypeScript
- **Structure**: Monorepo with `/server` and `/client` folders

## API Integration
- Search endpoint: `https://analytics.dugganusa.com/api/v1/search?q=QUERY&indexes=epstein_files`
- Stats endpoint: `https://analytics.dugganusa.com/api/v1/search/stats`

## Development
- Backend runs on port 3001
- Frontend runs on port 5173 (Vite dev server)
- Frontend proxies API calls to backend in development

- [x] Verify that the copilot-instructions.md file in the .github directory is created.

- [x] Install Required Extensions
